title: Duplicates change the goal
narration: We found a 2 in the middle, but that might not be the first 2.
callout: Finding any copy is not the same as finding the first copy.

title: Save it and search left
narration: When we find the target, we save answer = 2, then keep searching left for an earlier copy.
decision: Found target, save answer and move right to mid - 1.

predictionPrompt.prompt: After finding a target in a first-occurrence problem, which side should we keep checking?

choices.label: Left side
choices.feedback: Correct. An earlier copy could still be on the left.

choices.label: Right side
choices.feedback: Not this time. Right might hold later copies, not the first one.

title: Find the earliest copy
narration: We later land on index 1, save it, and then the loop ends. That is the first occurrence.
